_doc: ZRO unlock schedule from defillama.com/unlocks/layerzero. 55.99% unlocked / 44.01% × 1b = 440.1m ZRO locked. Monthly cliffs visible Apr-Jul 2026 totaling ~23.6m ZRO each: Strategic Partners 13m + Core Contributors 10.63m. Notes call out the Foundation 50M buyback from early investors that reduced Strategic Partners allocation, plus the 40M FTX clawback rolled into Strategic Partners.

events.note: Strategic Partners 13m ZRO/month at $14.82m/event. Chart shows monthly cadence through Jul 2027.
Core Contributors 10.63m ZRO/month at $12.11m/event. Same cadence as Strategic Partners.
